title: euscaphis japonica
intro: Euscaphis japonica, also known as the Japanese peppervine, is a climbing plant native to East Asia. The medicinal properties of Euscaphis japonica include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. Consuming Euscaphis japonica is believed to help manage conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and high blood pressure, as well as boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Euscaphis japonica are typically made into teas, infusions, or capsules and can be found in traditional Chinese medicine.
